originalTitle: Ghana and EU sign landmark defence deal to combat militant Islamist threat
title: Ghana and EU sign landmark defence deal to combat militant Islamist threat
content: Ghana is the first African country to make such a deal with the EU, the Ghanaian vice-president says.

originalTitle: Salah to leave Liverpool at end of season
title: Our African Hero Salah Says Goodbye to Liverpool!
content:
Hello, Super Star News!

Hello, amazing friends! Welcome to our special news report from Africa! I am your friendly reporter, ready to share exciting stories with you. Today, we have big news about a super famous football player. He is from our very own continent, Africa! Get ready to hear about Mohamed Salah.

Who is Mohamed Salah?

Mohamed Salah is a football superstar! He is from a country called Egypt. Egypt is a beautiful country in Africa. Salah is very, very good at playing football. He runs super fast and scores many goals! People call him "The Egyptian King." He makes his country very proud. Did you know? Mohamed Salah is known all over the world! Many children look up to him. He shows that with hard work, you can achieve your dreams.

Salah's Time with Liverpool

Salah played for a famous team called Liverpool. Liverpool is a big football club in England. They wear bright red shirts. Salah wore the number 11 on his back. He played with Liverpool for many years. During his time there, he helped Liverpool win many important games and trophies. A trophy is a big shiny cup you win for being the best! He scored so many goals for them. He became one of the best players they ever had. Did you know? Liverpool's fans sing a special song for Salah! It makes him feel very loved.

Why Salah is Saying Goodbye

Now, Mohamed Salah has shared some big news. He is going to leave Liverpool when this football season ends. It means he will not play for the red team anymore. This is a big change for him and for the team. He said that playing for Liverpool was "the best time of my life." This means he was very, very happy playing there. He loved playing football with his friends in the red shirt. Sometimes, players move to new teams for new adventures. It's like moving to a new school! Did you know? Football players often travel around the world to play for different teams!

Thanking the Amazing Fans

Salah also said something very sweet. He thanked the fans of Liverpool. Fans are the people who love the team. They cheer for the players. They wear the team's colours. They watch every game. Salah said the fans "stood by me in the toughest times." This means even when things were hard, like when he didn't score or when the team lost, the fans still loved him. They clapped for him. They believed in him. That made him feel very strong. It shows how much love the fans have for their heroes. Did you know? Fans are super important for sports teams! Their cheers give players lots of energy.

What Happens Next for Salah?

So, what happens next for our hero, Mohamed Salah? He will go on to play for a new team. We don't know which team yet, but we are sure he will do great! He will wear a new shirt and make new friends. He will keep scoring amazing goals. He will keep making children in Africa and all over the world proud. It's an exciting new adventure for him! We will be watching to see where "The Egyptian King" goes next. Did you know? Even famous players like Salah train very hard every day to stay good at football!

Learning from Salah

Mohamed Salah teaches us many things. He teaches us to work hard. He teaches us to be kind. He teaches us to be thankful to people who support us. He also shows us that it's okay for things to change. Change can bring new and exciting opportunities. No matter where Salah plays, he will always be an African hero. He will always be "The Egyptian King." Did you know? Football is more than just a game; it's about teamwork, respect, and never giving up!

Football Fun for Everyone!

Football is a wonderful game. It brings people together. Children all over Africa love to kick a ball around. Maybe one day, you too can become a great football star like Mohamed Salah! Remember to always have fun, play fair, and support your friends. That's all for today from our Super Star News report! Keep shining brightly, my friends!
summary: Mohamed Salah, a famous football player from Egypt, is leaving his team Liverpool after many happy years, thanking his fans for their love and support through good and hard times.
whyMatters: This is important because Salah is an an African hero who inspires many children, and his big move shows that even superstars experience change and new adventures.

title: Elon Musk's Starlink blocked from operating in Namibia
content: Namibia's regulator noted that Starlink's subsidiary is not locally owned.

originalTitle: Pilots killed in LaGuardia plane crash named
title: Pilots killed in LaGuardia plane crash named
content: Investigators released details from the final three minutes of cockpit and tower communications, which showed controllers cleared both the plane and a fire truck to cross the runway.

title: Russia launches 948 drones at Ukraine in largest attack over 24-hour period
content: Cities across Ukraine were hit, with local officials reporting at least eight people killed and dozens injured.

title: Premier League great Salah will leave lifetime of memories
content: Mohamed Salah will leave Liverpool as an all-time great and iconic Premier League figure, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

title: Salah to leave Liverpool at end of season
content: The Egypt forward says Liverpool fans "gave me the best time of my life" and "stood by me in the toughest times".

title: How Scotland reached the World Cup - told by those who made it happen
